project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Repeatable Web-console-first OSDCloud/iPXE deployment flow for Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW.

development.purpose: Edit code, docs, tests, commit, and push.

deployment_clone.purpose: Pull pushed commits and run deployment-facing tests from a production-like clone.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root created or updated only by the normal deployment workflow.

development.summary: Web OS Image Cache downloads now expose phase-aware progress through validation, DISM export, cache finalization, and stale polling detection.

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin-github master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
after_development_push_before_tests: confirm deployment clone HEAD equals the pushed development commit
forbidden: Do not use the development workspace as the deployment test clone.
Do not edit code directly in the deployment clone.
Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit C:\OSDCloud.

recent_changes.summary: Pushed phase-aware OS Image Cache download progress and stale Web-console status text to origin-github/master.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/osImages.test.js tools/osdcloud-console/test/serviceController.test.js tools/osdcloud-console/test/webUi.test.js; npm test; git diff --check; git push -u origin-github master; git rev-parse HEAD origin-github/master; no Web/runtime/PXE services started

recent_changes.summary: Pushed the Web Prepare runtime ObjectSecurity duplicate TypeData log filter to origin-github/master.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/serviceController.test.js; npm test; git diff --check; git push -u origin-github master; no Web/runtime/PXE services started

recent_changes.summary: Pushed the zero-to-one deployment test result runbook and agent reference documentation to origin-github/master.
recent_changes.verification: git push -u origin-github master; git ls-remote --heads origin-github

recent_changes.summary: Added TEST-RESULT.md as the completed 0-to-1 deployment test evidence and no-AI rebuild runbook, and linked it from AGENTS.md.
recent_changes.verification: rg TEST-RESULT/0-to-1 references; git diff --check AGENTS.md TEST-RESULT.md .ai/status.json

recent_changes.summary: Started HTTP, TFTP, and DHCP deployment services on LAN 192.168.100.1 after DHCP-safe confirmation; PXE client can now boot.
recent_changes.verification: POST /api/services/start-all; TCP 80 and UDP 67/69 listening on 192.168.100.1; HTTP boot.ipxe/wimboot/bootmgr/bootx64.efi/BCD/boot.sdi returned 200; boot.wim HEAD returned 200
